name: Continuous-Observable Causal Response Fingerprint
INHERITS_NOTHING_FROM: EXP-GT-FINGERPRINT-00. The Boolean prospective PASS is not transferable and is not transferred.
claim: A fixed continuous-response fingerprint can remain stable across repeated observations and across behaviourally equivalent continuous systems, while separating genuinely different accessible dynamics or hidden state, under a declared noise model and a fixed intervention repertoire.

FROZEN_battery.rich_arm: the limited battery PLUS sustained clamps (+1/-1, hold 24) on all four internal addresses.
FROZEN_battery.amplitude_ladder: two amplitudes. A single-amplitude battery is provably blind to saturation.
FROZEN_battery.baseline: ONE INDEPENDENT BASELINE EPISODE PER PROBE EPISODE
FROZEN_battery.refused_probe: MISSING, charged to COVERAGE. Never substituted, never scored as zero.

FROZEN_representation.name: NSRC -- Noise-Standardized Response Curve
FROZEN_representation.alignment: to the EXOGENOUS PROBE ONSET, not the response onset. Latency is part of the accessible function.
FROZEN_representation.sigma_hat: std of first differences of the pooled pre-probe segments / sqrt(2)
FROZEN_representation.why_the_noise_and_not_the_signal: units rescale response AND noise; gain rescales the response and leaves the noise alone. Standardizing by the noise is exactly unit-invariant and exactly gain-sensitive. L7 proves it.
FROZEN_representation.signed: the deviation is a SIGNED real -- not blind to inversion, unlike the Boolean XOR-deviation.

FROZEN_metric.block: per (probe,phase) RMS of the standardized difference
FROZEN_metric.aggregate_why: 'indistinguishable under the repertoire' is a FOR-ALL, certified by its WORST case. A MEAN diluted the supply pair's real separation of 21.8 to 8.6 with 24 blocks of pure noise.
FROZEN_metric.phase_quotient: cyclic (minimization over the group, ONE shift for the whole fingerprint)
FROZEN_metric.scale_band_why: sigma_hat carries ~1.39% relative error which MULTIPLIES the signal, injecting eps*z_signal into a system's comparison WITH ITSELF. The metric minimizes over one common lambda clipped to the estimator's own +-3sigma band. DECLARED PRICE: gain differences below ~4% are NOT resolvable.
FROZEN_metric.there_is_no_SAME: Two systems no admissible probe can separate are an EQUIVALENCE CLASS, not one individual.

FROZEN_admission.Z_DET_calibration: NOISE-ONLY: max|z| on rows that CANNOT respond has mean 3.67, max 5.25. Z_DET=8 is 1.5x the largest excursion ever seen on noise. No label was consulted.

development_certificate.L6_DID_NOT_FIRE: REPORTED, NOT HIDDEN. The lexicographic phase quotient is stable in this benchmark because the phase rows are well separated. The cyclic-shift quotient is therefore a PRINCIPLED choice but is NOT demonstrated load-bearing here. A control that does not fire is not a control.

prospective_split: docs/CONTINUOUS_SPLIT_MANIFEST.json, committed at de97ee0 BEFORE this instrument existed. NOT ONE PROSPECTIVE SYSTEM HAS BEEN SIMULATED AT THE TIME OF THIS FREEZE.
failure_rule: If either arm fails prospectively: RETIRE the version, preserve artifacts, and no repaired version inherits this split. PASS authorizes ONLY SC-PILOT-CONTINUOUS-FINGERPRINT-PREFLIGHT. It does NOT authorize the droplet pilot. SC-PILOT-CAUSAL-FINGERPRINT and EXP-SC-01 remain BLOCKED regardless of outcome.
